meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for Samsung Galaxy Tab repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: Samsung Galaxy Tab Repair Winnipeg | Screen & Battery Fix | Mobile Tech Lab
page.metaDescription: Professional Samsung Galaxy Tab repair in Winnipeg. Screen replacement, battery, charging port repair for Tab S10, S9, S8, A9, Active & all models. Same-day service available.
page.heroDescription: Winnipeg's dedicated Galaxy Tab repair specialists. From the powerful Tab S10 Ultra to everyday Tab A devices.

heroImage.alt: Samsung Galaxy Tab repair services in Winnipeg

services.name: Screen Replacement
services.description: Fix cracked Galaxy Tab S10, S9, or A series displays.

services.name: Battery Replacement
services.description: Restore all-day battery life to your Galaxy Tab.

services.name: Charging Port Repair
services.description: Repair USB-C ports for reliable charging and DeX connectivity.

services.name: S Pen & Digitizer
services.description: Fix S Pen connectivity issues and digitizer repairs.

services.name: Camera Repair
services.description: Fix front and rear cameras for video calls and content creation.

advantage_pillars.title: All Tab Generations
advantage_pillars.description: From Tab S10 Ultra to legacy Tab S3.

advantage_pillars.title: Enterprise & Active
advantage_pillars.description: Rugged Active series and enterprise tablet repair.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Screen repair warranties vary by part tier (30 days to lifetime). 90-day battery warranty.

models_description: We service all Samsung Galaxy Tab generations including the latest Tab S10 series and rugged Active models.

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: Galaxy Tab repair costs depend heavily on the model. Samsung's official tablet support page provides battery diagnostics.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: Many customers are surprised that a Tab S series screen can cost nearly as much as a new budget tablet. iFixit's Galaxy Tab teardowns show the adhesive-sealed designs.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: If the repair cost approaches your tablet's current value, we'll explain that clearly.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: When repair doesn't make sense, data recovery or data transfer is often still possible.

faqs.question: How long does Galaxy Tab screen repair take in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Most Galaxy Tab screen repairs are completed same-day, typically within 2-4 hours.

faqs.question: Can you fix water-damaged Galaxy Tabs?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer water damage assessment and repair for all Galaxy Tab devices.

faqs.question: Do you repair Galaxy Tab S Pen functionality?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We diagnose and repair S Pen connectivity issues.

faqs.question: Is this different from your Samsung phone repair?
faqs.answer: Yes! This page is specifically for Galaxy Tab tablets.

faqs.question: How much does Galaxy Tab repair cost?
faqs.answer: Costs vary by model and repair type. Contact us for a free quote.

service_area_note: Serving St. Vital, Fort Garry, Garden City, Transcona, and all Winnipeg neighborhoods. Also serving Thompson, MB. Walk-ins welcome or book online.

locations.name: St. Vital Centre
locations.address: 1225 St Mary's Rd, Winnipeg, MB R2M 5E5

cta.smsMessage: Hi, I found your site searching for Samsung Galaxy Tab repair. Can you help?

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
